sub_modules.highpass_fir_coeff_rom: Combinational ROM for the fixed 101 signed Q15 high-pass FIR coefficients.
sub_modules.highpass_fir_product: Combinational signed sample-by-coefficient multiplier for one FIR tap.
sub_modules.highpass_fir_accumulator: Combinational wide signed accumulator that sums all tap products into a 64-bit result.
sub_modules.highpass_fir_q15_normalize: Combinational arithmetic Q15 normalization stage using signed right shift by 15.
